pages.image_tooltip: A small cave-dwelling duck inhabiting tropical islands, Talpanas is unable to see, swim, or fly, unfortunately making it the perfect target for §kobfuscate§7, at the hands of whom it met its extinction.

pages.feature_3.tooltip: §7Talpanas' blindness makes them susceptible to walking into hazards, ensure enclosures are safe!
pages.feature_3.title: Workplace Hazards
pages.feature_1.tooltip: §7The artifact used to revive Talpanas is found in §aWarm Ocean Ruins§7
pages.feature_1.title: Duck Island
pages.feature_2.tooltip: Being recently-extinct, Talpanas are able to breed after being fed §aHanging Roots§7
pages.feature_2.title: Subterraneous Snack

pages.feature_1.tooltip: §7What remains of their eyes are highly sensitive, Talpanas avoids both natural and player-placed light
pages.feature_1.title: Light at the End of the Tunnel
